description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-seater sofa upholstered in a solid light blue fabric. The sofa features broad, straight armrests that are the same height as the backrest, giving it a geometric and contemporary appearance. The seat and back cushions are integrated into the frame, appearing as a single, uniform surface without visible separations or tufting. The sofa sits on four short, blocky black legs, slightly elevating it off the ground. The upholstery has a subtle, matte texture, and the overall design is minimalist with clean lines and no decorative elements. This type of sofa would be suitable for urban parks, public waiting areas, or outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, boxy light blue sofa with broad straight armrests, integrated cushions, and short black block legs. The design is minimalist and geometric, with a matte fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, two seat sections, straight backrest, and broad armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth, straight armrest, and the uniform height of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, unadorned back panel and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the straight armrest and the sofa's depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two integrated seat cushions and a single continuous back cushion, all attached and uniform in size, with no visible separations or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, rectangular profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, finished in black, slightly recessed and visually minimal.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, medium-height backrest that is continuous across the width, with no segmentation or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light blue fabric with a subtle, matte texture and no visible pattern, stitching, or decorative detailing.
